name: Watch Dog
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>番</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>犬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ウォッチドッグ
desc: During your Main Phase 2, if this card was Normal Summoned this turn: You can send 1 Spell Card from your hand to the Graveyard; Set 1 Continuous Spell Card directly from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Watch Dog" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon during the turn you activate this effect.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase 2, if this card was Normal Summoned this turn: You can send 1 Spell Card from your hand to the Graveyard; Set 1 Continuous Spell Card directly from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Watch Dog" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon during the turn you activate this effect.
eff: During your Main Phase 2, if this card was Normal Summoned this turn: You can send 1 Spell Card from your hand to the Graveyard; Set 1 Continuous Spell Card directly from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Watch Dog" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon during the turn you activate this effect.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
